docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,894.64 FILED BY KWIKCASH, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAPREVOTTE, JACQUELINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $60.00) SERVED NOV-20-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAPREVOTTE, JACQUELINE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANNA ARCHER, LEGAL EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF KWIKCASH, INC., REPRESENTED BY ANNA ARCHER, LEGAL EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL OFFICER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACQUELINE LAPREVOTTE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
